channel.title: ElevenLabs Blog
channel.description: ElevenLabs Blog — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Introducing Music v2, our groundbreaking new music model
item.description: Better vocals, instrumentation, and arrangement across every genre, improved multilingual support plus capabilities that weren

item.title: Introducing Dubbing v2: our revolutionary new dubbing model
item.description: Introducing Dubbing v2: our revolutionary new dubbing model, which carries the emotion and performance of the original speaker across every language.

item.title: Bringing the ElevenLabs Summit home to Warsaw
item.description: Today, we’re hosting 2,500 founders, leaders, researchers, developers, and artists from across Europe for the ElevenLabs Summit in Teatr Wielki.
